resources.title: Cortex Getting Started block storage documentation
resources.evidence_quote: So in the document, you can click on documentation and and click on getting started. We have all the steps that we can do. And click on block storage, which is going to be the next default storage, which does not involve an index tool.

resources.title: Cortex upstream Docker Compose demos
resources.evidence_quote: Also, if you want to just run the upstream demos of con Docker Compose, you could also do that. It's straightforward.

resources.title: Thanos project
resources.evidence_quote: But you could also have a look at Thanos.
